title: ALIVE Engine
subtitle: AI Persona & Memory Platform
lead: AI persona, memory and relationship platform. Real-time behavioral intelligence for immersive 3D environments — the core engine behind ALIVE Park, Samsung EHS safety education, and Mana Tech's AI Virtual Human Kiosks.
bodyHtml:
Bringing AI into three-dimensional context

ALIVE Engine is XRX's proprietary generative neural framework. It injects real-time behavioral intelligence into immersive 3D environments, transforming static characters and environments into entities that perceive, remember, and respond.

Unlike text-only LLM integrations, ALIVE treats space, identity, and continuity as first-class primitives. Characters running on ALIVE do not reset between interactions — they maintain persistent memory, evolve their understanding of individuals over time, and behave coherently across sessions.

Core capabilities

  • Real-time AI persona with persistent long-term memory
  • Emotional state modeling and relationship graph
  • Behavioral intelligence grounded in 3D spatial context
  • Sub-12ms response latency in production environments
  • Native Unreal Engine and Unity SDK integration
  • Multi-agent orchestration for populated environments
  • Continuous behavioral learning from live interaction data

title: ALIVE AI & XR Safety Education for Samsung EHS
subtitle: Client Work — Samsung Electronics
lead: Developing AI & XR-based safety education content on the ALIVE platform for Samsung EHS, as the officially selected AI & XR Technology Partner.
bodyHtml:
Overview

XRX was selected as Samsung Electronics' official AI & XR Technology Partner in 2025 to develop next-generation safety education content for Samsung EHS. The project applies ALIVE Engine to create adaptive, immersive training scenarios.

By combining behavioral AI with extended reality, the curriculum moves beyond video-based safety modules into living scenarios where each trainee receives personalized guidance.

What we did

  • Partnered as Samsung's official AI & XR Technology Partner
  • Adapted ALIVE Engine for enterprise safety training workflows
  • Designed immersive XR scenarios with behavioral feedback loops
  • Integrated with Samsung EHS evaluation and reporting systems

title: ALIVE Park
subtitle: Interactive AI Theme Park
lead: An AI-powered interactive theme park platform that brings ALIVE Engine's real-time reactive spatial experiences into the physical world.
bodyHtml:
Overview

ALIVE Park is XRX's flagship platform that translates ALIVE Engine into physical-digital hybrid spaces. Visitors interact with AI characters embedded across multiple zones — each retaining memory and coordinating through a distributed mesh network.

Key features

  • Distributed mesh topology for 10M+ concurrent entities
  • Unified memory layer across physical zones and AI characters
  • Real-time visitor interaction with persistent behavioral context
  • Production-grade spatial orchestration built on ALIVE Engine

title: ALIVE AI Virtual Human Kiosks — Miami
subtitle: Client Work — Mana Tech, US Expansion
lead: Deployed ALIVE-based AI Virtual Human Kiosks across Miami in partnership with Mana Tech — XRX's first major North American expansion.
bodyHtml:
Overview

Through a strategic partnership with Mana Tech, XRX launched its first large-scale North American deployment of AI Virtual Human Kiosks in Miami. Each kiosk is powered by ALIVE Engine, enabling the virtual human to recognize returning visitors and sustain contextual conversations.

What we did

  • Partnership agreement with Mana Tech signed for US rollout
  • Deployed AI Virtual Human Kiosks at multiple Miami locations
  • Integrated ALIVE persistent memory for returning-visitor recognition
  • Localized interaction patterns for US English context

title: ONTO — OntologyHub.ai
subtitle: Knowledge Graph Platform
lead: A personal knowledge graph and ontology hub — MCP-compatible platform connecting individual knowledge to AI agents across GPT, Claude, and Gemini.
bodyHtml:
Overview

ONTO is XRX's knowledge infrastructure layer. It turns individuals and organizations into living ontologies — structured graphs of entities, concepts, and relationships that evolve continuously as new information is ingested.

Through native Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, ONTO connects personal ontologies to leading AI agents, enabling cross-platform context sharing. Live at ontologyhub.ai.

Key features

  • MCP-native protocol for GPT, Claude, Gemini
  • Semantic entity extraction and automated ontology construction
  • Personal AI mapping with continuously evolving knowledge graphs
  • Cross-platform context sharing via standardized MCP endpoints

title: XDT — Industrial Digital Twin
subtitle: Digital Twin Platform
lead: An XR-based digital twin platform synchronizing physical and digital spaces in real time — deployed across industrial sites and smart facilities.
bodyHtml:
Overview

XDT (eXtended Digital Twin) unifies heterogeneous industrial communication standards — ROS 2, MQTT, OPC-UA, Modbus — into a single real-time 3D visualization layer. Every connected device, sensor, robot, and controller is rendered as a living twin.

Field devices are registered via JSON configuration with no custom PLC coding. AI-driven anomaly detection triggers predictive maintenance in real time. Live at xdt.co.kr.

Key features

  • Protocol-agnostic device registration (ROS 2 / MQTT / OPC-UA / Modbus)
  • JSON-declarative device onboarding — no PLC coding
  • Real-time 3D digital twin rendering with sub-second sync
  • AI anomaly detection and predictive maintenance

title: XR-based Drone Control
subtitle: Partnership — Pablo Air
lead: A 2026 strategic partnership with Pablo Air to advance XR-based drone control technologies, combining XRX spatial AI with Pablo Air's aviation platform.
bodyHtml:
Overview

In early 2026, XRX entered a strategic partnership with Pablo Air — a Korean drone operations leader — to co-develop XR-based drone control technologies.

Focus areas

  • Integrated XRX spatial AI with Pablo Air flight operations stack
  • Prototyping XR interfaces for drone pilot situational awareness
  • Exploring autonomous multi-drone coordination powered by AI agents

title: NVIDIA Inception Program
subtitle: Partnership — NVIDIA
lead: Selected for the NVIDIA Inception Program in 2024 — unlocking global technical support, early access to NVIDIA technology, and GPU infrastructure.
bodyHtml:
Overview

XRX was admitted to the NVIDIA Inception Program in 2024, joining a curated network of deep-tech startups advancing the frontier of AI and graphics.

Benefits

  • Early access to NVIDIA GPU architectures and SDKs
  • Technical co-development support for real-time neural pipelines
  • Integration with NVIDIA Omniverse for digital twin research

title: Microsoft Launcher Program
subtitle: Partnership — Microsoft
lead: Selected for the Microsoft Launcher Program in 2024 — securing cloud infrastructure support, co-sell resources, and global technical partnership.
bodyHtml:
Overview

XRX was selected for the Microsoft Launcher Program in 2024, gaining access to Azure cloud infrastructure, enterprise sales channels, and engineering support.

Benefits

  • Azure cloud infrastructure credits and technical support
  • Co-sell and go-to-market collaboration with Microsoft field teams
  • Integration pathway with Microsoft enterprise AI ecosystem

title: CES 2026 Official Exhibitor
subtitle: Exhibition — CES · Las Vegas
lead: Officially selected to exhibit XRX's innovative ALIVE technology at CES 2026 in Las Vegas — introducing Breathing Life into AI to the global stage.
bodyHtml:
Overview

XRX has been officially chosen to showcase ALIVE Engine at CES 2026 in Las Vegas. The booth will demonstrate ALIVE's real-time AI personas, persistent memory, and cross-platform deployments.

Booth highlights

  • Live demo of ALIVE Engine's AI personas and persistent memory
  • Showcase of ALIVE Park, Samsung EHS, and Mana Tech deployments
  • Press briefings and strategic partner meetings

title: 3rd Place — UKC Startup Pitch
subtitle: R&D / Award — US-Korea Conference 2024
lead: Won 3rd place at the US-Korea Conference (UKC) 2024 Startup Pitch Competition in Atlanta — an early validation of XRX's technological competitiveness in the US market.
bodyHtml:
Overview

At the US-Korea Conference 2024 held in Atlanta, XRX presented its ALIVE Engine and ONTO platform to a panel of US-based investors, researchers, and industry leaders. The pitch secured 3rd place.

The award was XRX's first formal recognition in the US and opened follow-on partnership conversations that led to the Mana Tech Miami deployment.

title: Real-Time UHD Content System Patent
subtitle: R&D / IP — Core Technology Patent
lead: Core patents registered in 2024 for XRX's Real-Time Responsive Ultra-High-Resolution Content Generation and Playback System — the foundational IP behind ALIVE and XDT.
bodyHtml:
Overview

In 2024, XRX successfully registered the core patents for its Real-Time Responsive Ultra-High-Resolution Content Generation and Playback System. The patent family covers novel methods for synthesizing, streaming, and rendering ultra-high-resolution interactive content with real-time AI-driven responsiveness.

This IP underpins ALIVE Engine's real-time spatial rendering and XDT's digital twin visualization layers.
